expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜子的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度] 是总尺寸，[板厚] 是顶板、底板和侧板的厚度，[背板厚度] 是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan untuk papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] เป็นขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước bảng cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Trên, Dưới và Bên, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng Nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng kahoy para sa gabinete. Ang [Width], [Height], at [Depth] ay ang kabuuang Sukatan, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibaba at Gilid ng Lupon, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Baliktad na Lupon. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပရိဘောဂအတွက်အဖွဲ့အစည်းများကိုတွက်ချင်ခြင်း။ " [Width], [Height], [Depth]" သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး "[BoardThick]" သည်ထက်တက် , အောက်ဆုံးနှင့်ဖက်ဘက်ရှိပြားအထူ , “[BackBoardThick]” သည်နောက်ခံဗို့ရှင်းပြားအထူ။(AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាឯកសារ​កាត់​សម្រាប់ទូ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺជា​ភាពរួមសរុប​ប្រហាក់ប្រហែល។ [BoardThick] គឺត្រើយពណ៌សសម្រាប់ឧបករណ៍ខាងលើនៅផ្នែកប្រាក់មុខ [BackBoardThick] គឺផ្នែកសន្លឹមកំរឹតនៃារធទុកដាក់ថ្មី។(AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ສັ້ນທາງເຈສັ້ນທາງສໍເພີ່ມເພີ່ມ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットのボードサイズを計算します。幅、全体の寸法、高さ、奥行、厚さを具体적으로なぜならล้าน่าน่าเป็นความสำเร็จ (AI translated, please check)
